labels.name: phase-7
labels.description: Phase 7 roadmap work for the configurable single-ETF paper-trading MVP.

labels.name: track:ops
labels.description: Scheduler, deployment, and operational runbook work.

issues.title: Phase 7.1: autonomous single-ETF paper loop with OpenAI and Claude backends
issues.body:
## Summary
Add an unattended single-ETF paper loop that writes six-model consensus proposals, routes agent approval through either OpenAI or Claude with deterministic fallback, and reports one-month paper outcomes against baselines.

## Scope
- keep the paper loop configurable for any single ETF
- tracked unattended-month config uses `QQQ`
- ship `VOO` as a first-class alternate config
- replace the pinned single-model proposal with a deterministic `4-of-6` consensus proposal
- add an autonomous agent worker that can use `openai` or `claude`
- keep `deterministic_consensus` as the required fallback backend
- add month-run paper reporting against `buy_hold`, `sma`, each model path, and the consensus path

## Non-goals
- no live-money broker support
- no multi-symbol execution
- no freeform LLM trade generation
- no web UI

issues.title: Add six-model paper decision and consensus proposal artifacts
issues.body:
## Scope
- expand `paper-decision` from one model to the full six-model registry
- persist one proposal plus one evidence artifact per trade date
- apply a deterministic `4-of-6` long-vote rule for the executable consensus proposal
- keep the paper path single-ETF, long-or-cash, and one-day horizon only

## Depends on
- Phase 7.1: autonomous single-ETF paper loop with OpenAI and Claude backends

## Review
- financial-expert
- qa

issues.title: Add autonomous paper agent worker and deterministic approval backend
issues.body:
## Scope
- add `paper-agent-approve` and a long-running agent worker service
- keep agent authority limited to approve-or-reject of the existing proposal only
- add deterministic approval rules for malformed or inconsistent proposals
- persist provider, model, rationale, and fallback metadata in approval artifacts

## Depends on
- Add six-model paper decision and consensus proposal artifacts

## Review
- critic
- qa

issues.title: Add OpenAI and Claude approval backends with structured fallback
issues.body:
## Scope
- add `paper.agent_backend`, `paper.agent_model`, and timeout/fallback config fields
- implement OpenAI structured-output approval decisions with the official SDK
- implement Claude structured-output approval decisions with the official SDK
- fall back to `deterministic_consensus` on provider timeout, API failure, or invalid output

## Depends on
- Add autonomous paper agent worker and deterministic approval backend

## Review
- critic
- qa

issues.title: Add tracked QQQ and VOO paper configs plus month-run paper reporting
issues.body:
## Scope
- keep `configs/experiment.qqq_paper_daily.yaml` as the tracked unattended-month config
- add `configs/experiment.voo_paper_daily.yaml` as a first-class alternate config
- update Compose and docs for scheduler plus agent worker plus MCP sidecar
- add `paper-report` outputs for realized paper path, consensus, each model path, `buy_hold`, and `sma`

## Depends on
- Add OpenAI and Claude approval backends with structured fallback

## Review
- critic
- qa
